_comment: Open work for agents and people. One entry per tasks/<id>.md brief. status: open|claimed|partial|done. contributors: GitHub logins credited (rendered as avatars), filled as work lands.

tasks.title: Audit EigenAI from inside EigenCompute
tasks.blocked_on: the gateway is callable only from inside an attested enclave
tasks.summary: The gateway attest.fyi is built on, and the one it can't audit from outside: caller-attested (a KMS-JWT minted only inside EigenCompute) and a proxy to closed frontier models. Verifying it means joining the network.

tasks.title: Verify Tinfoil
tasks.summary: Intel TDX + H100, DCAP RA. Likely reaches a full pass if it serves a small model we can reference. Never run — no key.

tasks.title: Bind the large TEE models
tasks.summary: NanoGPT, Chutes and NEAR have verified seals but unbound models — only because this machine can't host a big enough reference. Bind them, lift partial → pass.

tasks.title: Build the AMD SEV-SNP verifier
tasks.summary: The engine parses Intel TDX and NVIDIA, not AMD SEV-SNP. Build VCEK → ASK → ARK verification to AMD's KDS root. Needs one real report to test against.

tasks.title: Verify PrivateMode
tasks.summary: AMD SEV-SNP + TDX in a Cosmian/Edgeless confidential VM, attested through a proxy/SDK rather than a plain endpoint. Capturing one report also unblocks the SEV-SNP verifier.

tasks.title: Verify Maple
tasks.summary: Markets AMD SEV-SNP, but no public API surfaced at survey time. Find a real endpoint, or document that it isn't externally verifiable — itself an on-thesis result.
